description: Use this API to read a Dynamics Model Raw Data File and append the model references specified in its data records to the simulation data already contained in dynamics working memory (activity DYRE,ADD). This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = dyre_add(startindx, dyrefile, conecfile, conetfile)

parameters.name: startindx
parameters.description: An array of four elements specifying starting locations in the dynamics data storage arrays. (input).

parameters.name: dyrefile
parameters.description: Name of the dynamics model raw data file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: conecfile
parameters.description: Name of the output file for conec additions; blank to route data to the progress area. (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: conetfile
parameters.description: Name of the output file for conet additions; blank to route data to the progress area. (input; blank by default).

startindx.description: starting CON index (the next available CON by default).
starting STATE index (the next available STATE by default).
starting VAR index (the next available VAR by default).
starting ICON index (the next available ICON by default).

error_codes.description: machine model connection tables full–use pack plant model tables function.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
